raw_consumer_statement: The Citibank did double charges in XXXX flexi payments transactions to my credit card. Plus, I should already have the refund from XXXX XXXX for {$77.00} dls from each charge ( 3 charges ) plus XXXX refunds from XXXX XXXX of the same amount {$77.00} dls. Total is {$670.00} dls. This money is charged to my credit card balance and It has to be removed to my credit card in order to make a payment, because it is alterating my balance a lot.
